flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of the Cumberlands fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of the Cumberlands rose 59% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4k → 6.9k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of the Cumberlands fell 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($17.1k → $14.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of the Cumberlands rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (67.1% → 74.3%).
